own_review_points: FlatHash is not thread-safe and is guarded by a ReadWriteLock; under many concurrent equality-delete loads the write lock can contend (PR author already acknowledges this risk)

Positions is a hand-copied simplified SelectedPositions due to trino-main being test-scope-only in the iceberg plugin — duplication that can drift from the original; the human ref notes a related micro-inefficiency at Positions.java:89 (range vs list iteration)
New BlocksHashFactory SPI method added as a default throwing UnsupportedOperationException — verify all out-of-tree connectors are not broken and consider @Unstable marking
TestIcebergLegacyEqualityDeletes duplicates a large test body just to flip the feature flag false; will need consolidation when the flag is removed
notes: v8 is articulate but almost entirely praise and soft 'consider' suggestions with no concrete bug; none of the points reach 'good' substance and most restate the design or the PR's own acknowledged risk. The EXPECTED_SIZE=1024 and @Unstable suggestions are speculative and unverifiable from the truncated diff, scored 0. It misses the human-reference Positions iteration nit (range vs list).
